issues.description: Missing condition to restrict effect to opponent's turn. Text states '[Opponent's Turn]' which requires duration or conditional check.
Target should be 'OwnLeaderUpTo1' or similar to reflect 'up to 1 of your Leader' (selective targeting, not all leaders).
Trigger should include condition 'ByEffect' — text specifies 'K.O.'d by an effect', not all KOs.
